caveat: This score reflects a debug-mode smoke test on a synthetic 20-60-ticker fixture with an artificially injected return signal, over 3 windows with N=32 subsamples -- NOT a genuine reproduction attempt on the paper's real (proprietary, unreleased) China A-share dataset with 170 windows and N=1536. A score of 0.16 here means 'wrong dataset + tiny sample', not 'broken implementation'. Re-run Stage 6 after real training on sourced China A-share data for a meaningful score.

root_causes.cause: Synthetic data has an artificially injected, cleaner signal (0.02*char[0] + 0.01*latent_quality) than real 20-day-ahead A-share returns
root_causes.suggested_fix: Source real China A-share data per data/README_data.md

root_causes.cause: Tiny synthetic universe (20-60 tickers vs. real top-450 pool) inflates rank-IC variance
Only 3 windows vs. the paper's 170 -- t_stat = icir*sqrt(n_windows) is mechanically deflated at this sample size
root_causes.suggested_fix: Run full --study main without --debug once real data is available

root_causes.cause: Hit-rate near-matches are likely coincidental: with 3 windows, hit rate can only take values in {0, 1/3, 2/3, 1}
root_causes.suggested_fix: Not a pipeline issue -- re-evaluate with a real window count

parametric.evidence: SIR ambiguities[0], confidence 0.6: paper's Eq. (1) includes an undefined H_q term.
parametric.suggested_fix: Config-swappable via quantum.hq_gate_interpretation in configs/config.yaml; also selectable in QuantumFeatureMap's constructor argument.

parametric.evidence: SIR ambiguities[1], confidence 0.5 -- paper never states gamma's tuning grid/procedure.
parametric.suggested_fix: Tune independently if real-data results for qkrr-pqk look poorly calibrated.

parametric.evidence: SIR ambiguities[2], confidence 0.55 -- cited but not restated in the paper.
parametric.suggested_fix: Cross-check against a hand-computed small example before trusting Table 4's 2x2 design results.

parametric.evidence: SIR ambiguities[3], confidence 0.55 -- 'stratified by date' allocation scheme not detailed.
parametric.suggested_fix: Low expected impact on point estimates; revisit if real-data N=1536 subsample looks unrepresentative.

parametric.evidence: SIR implementation_assumptions[4], confidence 0.5 -- not stated in the paper.
parametric.suggested_fix: Low expected impact; leave as-is unless NN3 baseline training looks unstable on real data.

omission.missing_component: Real China A-share data ingestion (CharacteristicBuilder.build_market_characteristics / build_fundamental_characteristics are stubbed with NotImplementedError)
omission.suggested_fix: Deliberate, documented scope decision (architecture_plan.json risk_assessment: 'High' severity, proprietary data unavailable) -- not an accidental gap. Implement against a real vendor feed per data/README_data.md's schema.

omission.missing_component: Full-scale walk-forward runs (170 main-study / 60 diagnostic-study windows) -- only a 3-window synthetic smoke test has been executed
omission.suggested_fix: Requires real data (see above) plus nontrivial compute (8-qubit exact statevector simulation x N=1536 x 170+60 windows); run_study.py supports this via --study main without --debug once data is wired in.

user_config_modifications: --debug flag: synthetic 20-60-ticker panel with injected signal, N=32 subsample, 3 windows -- vs. real ~450-stock universe, N=1536, 170 windows
review_reasons: User results come from a debug smoke-test on synthetic data with an artificially injected signal, not real China A-share data
Only 3 windows evaluated vs. the paper's 170 -- statistically meaningless sample size
No genuine reproduction attempt against arXiv:2607.20168's real (unreleased) dataset has been performed
